$comment: Gene symbols this project must cover before it can be considered complete. Source: docs/genovy-dx-project-log.md miss inventory. Chapter accessions are resolved at build time by `buildManifest.js` against the live GeneReviews titles index — we never hard-code accessions we have not verified.
p2_high_yield_rare_disease_index: $comment: Filled in by buildManifest from the NCBI GeneReviews titles index, ranked by HPO disease-phenotype edge count + ClinVar pathogenic variant volume.
